title: Francesca
why_this_song: Francesca by Hozier (2023) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I want to change it each time
Heaven is not fit to house a love (Heaven is not fit to house a love)
If I could hold you for a minute
Dar-, darling, I would do it again (ah-ah, ah-ah)

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "darling" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "darling" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "heaven" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "heaven" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Do you think I'd give up?
I'd tell them: "Put me back in it"
Each piece of your body that it takes

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: That this might've shook the love from me
I'd tell them put me back in it

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Francesca" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Francesca"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Francesca", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Francesca", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: "Francesca" was released in 2023. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Francesca" foi lançada em 2023. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Hozier one question about "Francesca", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Hozier sobre "Francesca", o que seria e por quê?
